official_reference_evidence.claim: The pants are made from cream tweed with multicoloured flecks, a multicoloured braided drawcord, and fringed hems.
The pants are designed for a relaxed, baggy fit with an adjustable elastic waist.
The women's sizes are XS-S for EU 34-38, M for EU 38-40, and L-XL for EU 42-44.
The standard length is 110 cm from waistband to hem.
The pants are dry-clean only, and the delicate tweed should be kept away from rough surfaces that may snag it.

evidence.title: Why 90% of Women Don’t Look Good in Linen — How Elegant Women FIX IT
evidence.text: Why 90% of Women Don’t Look Good in Linen — How Elegant Women FIX IT — Let's be honest, linen sounds great, breathable, light, effortless until you put it on. Suddenly is wrinkled, shapeless, and somehow makes you look like it got dressed in a hurry. And no, the fix isn't to obsess over steaming or trying to keep it wrinkle-free, because linen is supposed to wrinkle. The trick is knowing how to wear it. So the wrinkles feel intentional and not sloppy. Once you get this right, linen becomes one of the most elegant, relaxed fabrics you will ever wear. Let me show you how. The problem isn't linen, it's the way we wear it. Linen on its own doesn't flatter everyone right out of the box. It's loose. It wrinkles. It often comes with... — Why 90% of Women Don’t Look Good in Linen — How Elegant Women FIX IT Let's be honest, linen sounds great, breathable, light, effortless until you put it on. Suddenly is wrinkled, shapeless, and somehow makes you look like it got dressed in a hurry. And no, the fix isn't to obsess over steaming or trying to keep it wrinkle-free, because linen is supposed to wrinkle. The trick is knowing how to wear it. So the wrinkles feel intentional and not sloppy. Once you get this right, linen becomes one of the most elegant, relaxed fabrics you will ever wear. Let me show you how. The problem isn't linen, it's the way we wear it. Linen on its own doesn't flatter everyone right out of the box. It's loose. It wrinkles. It often comes with elastic waistbands. evidence.title: How should you handle a customer who says, “I’m just looking”? It is one of the most common phrases in the showroom, and often the most mi
evidence.text: How should you handle a customer who says, “I’m just looking”? It is one of the most common phrases in the showroom, and often the most mi — How should you handle a customer that says I'm just looking firstly, you gotta remember that when you go into a store and a salesperson approaches you ask yourself how many times do you say those sales people I'm just looking when you think about it it's a natural human reflective answer to give as a salesperson can reduce the amount of times you get I'm just looking by walking up the customer and say hi, I'm Steve and you are great nice to meet you I noticed you're looking at the XYZ car you're then looking at that particular a car first of all you gotta start connecting with them so if they say to you, oh look here... — How should you handle a customer who says, “I’m just looking”? It is one of the most common phrases in the showroom, and often the most misunderstood. “I’m just looking” is not a rejection. It is a natural, reflexive response that needs the right approach. ✅ Stay calm and avoid getting defensive ✅ Remember people do not visit a dealership by accident ✅ Take the pressure off by acknowledging they are just browsing ✅ Ask permission to show vehicles while they browse ✅ Gently explore interest with questions about specials or specific models ✅ Work with the customer for 15 to 20 minutes before making a buying judgement When customers feel relaxed rather than pressured, they open up. That is when real conversations start and buying intent becomes clear. Celebrating 20 Years of TSS 🏆 www.totalsellingsolutions.com.au #TotalS

The next is actually my favorite of the five and it is a pair of lighter wash denims. Visually what makes a fatigue stand out is the pockets in the front. It gives it a much more casual... — 5 Casual Pants Every Man Needs Here are five casual pants I think every man needs in their wardrobe. The first is a pair of dark denim. Look for one in a slightly higher rise and a slightly wider leg, so you can wear across different functions, whether it is a date night or business casual meeting. The next is actually my favorite of the five and it is a pair of lighter wash denims. These reads more casual than the darker denim, but what I really love about this is its ability to contrast a darker top. The next are these pair of green fatigues. Visually what makes a fatigue stand out is the pockets in the front. It gives it a much more casual and rugged look. Fatigues also have side tabs if you don't want to wear a belt with it, which just gives it a little bit more functionality in that regard. The next is a pair of brown cotton canvas pants.
